# HelioGrid Home Battery Launch Copy

Use the copy set with status `approved_current` for the final launch image. Archived, draft, test, and deprecated copy must not be used as headline, subtitle, supporting line, or CTA.

## Copy candidates

| status | product name | launch message / headline | supporting line | CTA | notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| approved_current | HelioGrid Pulse | Store solar power for the moments that matter. | Quiet backup energy for modern homes. | Reserve early access. | Use this row for the current campaign. |
| archived_2024 | HelioGrid Core | Power Your Tomorrow | Backup power for every outage. | Get protected today | Archived message and retired slogan. Do not use. |
| draft_internal | HelioGrid Pulse | Never lose power again. | Whole-home protection that never fails. | Save 50% today | Draft copy contains unsupported claims. Do not use. |
| test_variant | HelioGrid Pulse | Smart solar storage for every home. | Free installation available this week. | Claim free install | Test copy contains unsupported offer. Do not use. |

## Current hierarchy

- Use the approved_current product name as the primary headline in the top title area.
- Use the approved_current launch message as the core subtitle near the headline.
- Show the approved_current supporting line clearly in the lower information area.
- Show the approved_current CTA as a bottom or bottom-safe-area call to action.
